#############################
# generate custom database
#############################

# polished_its2.fasta
#>Onchocerca_lineage_2_polished
#
#>Setaria_yehi_polished
#
#>Rumenfilaria_sample3_q18_unmapped_consensus
#

# polished_its2_seq2tax.map
# headerless
#Onchocerca_lineage_2_polished	1
#Setaria_yehi_polished	2
#Rumenfilaria_sample3_q18_unmapped_consensus	3

# polished_its2_taxonomy.tsv
# with header

#tax_id	species	genus	family	order	class	phylum	clade	superkingdom	subspecies	species subgroup	species group
#1	Onchocerca lineage2	Onchocerca	Onchocercidae	Rhabditida	Chromadorea	Nematoda	Opisthokonta
#2	Setaria yehi	Setaria	Setariidae	Rhabditida	Chromadorea	Nematoda	Opisthokonta	
#3	Rumenfilaria sp	Onchocercidae	Rhabditida	Chromadorea	Nematoda	Opisthokonta

conda activate /work/soghigian_lab/apps/conda/envs/emu-3.6.2
EMU=/work/soghigian_lab/apps/conda/envs/emu-3.6.2/emu

${EMU} build-database polished_its2 --sequences polished_its2.fasta --seq2tax polished_its2_seq2tax.map --taxonomy-list polished_its2_taxonomy.tsv

####################################################
# rename taxid if combining with genbank emu db
####################################################
# taxids need to be integers

CUSTOM_DB=polished_its2
GENBANK_DB=nem_its2
NEW_DB=nem_polished_its2

# find max taxid value in the first column
START_NUM=$(sed '1d' ${GENBANK_DB}/taxonomy.tsv | awk 'NR==1 || $1 > max {max=$1} END {print max}')

# script to add new ascending taxid to custom db
# edits seq2tax file
cat <(sed -n '1p' ${CUSTOM_DB}/${CUSTOM_DB}_taxonomy.tsv) <(sed '1d' ${CUSTOM_DB}/${CUSTOM_DB}_taxonomy.tsv | \
awk -v start="$START_NUM" '{print start+=1, $0}' OFS="\t" | \
cut -f 2 --complement) > ${CUSTOM_DB}/${CUSTOM_DB}_taxonomy.tmp.tsv

# edits taxonomy file
awk -v start="$START_NUM" '{print $1, start+=1, $2}' OFS="\t" ${CUSTOM_DB}/${CUSTOM_DB}_seq2tax.map | \
cut -f 3 --complement > ${CUSTOM_DB}/${CUSTOM_DB}_seq2tax.tmp.map

${EMU} build-database ${CUSTOM_DB} --sequences ${CUSTOM_DB}/${CUSTOM_DB}.fasta \
--seq2tax ${CUSTOM_DB}/${CUSTOM_DB}_seq2tax.tmp.map \
--taxonomy-list ${CUSTOM_DB}/${CUSTOM_DB}_taxonomy.tmp.tsv

#######################################################
# combining custom database and sequences from genbank
#######################################################

CUSTOM_DB=polished_its2
GENBANK_DB=nem_its2
NEW_DB=nem_polished_its2

mkdir ${NEW_DB}

cat ./${CUSTOM_DB}/species_taxid.fasta ./${GENBANK_DB}/species_taxid.fasta > ${NEW_DB}/species_taxid.fasta
cat ./${CUSTOM_DB}/taxonomy.tsv <(sed '1d' ./${GENBANK_DB}/taxonomy.tsv) > ${NEW_DB}/taxonomy.tsv
